1. **ComfyUI YoloNasPose Tensorrt** (ComfyUI-YoloNasPose-Tensorrt)
   This repo provides a ComfyUI Custom Node implementation of [a/YOLO-NAS-POSE](https://github.com/Deci-AI/super-gradients), powered by TensorRT for ultra fast pose estimation. It has been adapted to work with openpose controlnet (experimental)
   Author: yuvraj108c | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A

2. **Easy automatic (square) image cropper using Yolo** (ComfyUI-Yolo-Cropper)
   A very simple and easy to use node to automaticaaly create (square) image crops and masks using YoloV8. This can be very useful when using controlnet and ip adapters
   Author: Tool Of North america | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A

3. **AegisFlow Utility Nodes** (aegisflow_utility_nodes)
   These nodes will be placed in comfyui/custom_nodes/aegisflow and contains the image passer (accepts an image as either wired or wirelessly, input and passes it through. Latent passer does the same for latents, and the Preprocessor chooser allows a passthrough image and 10 controlnets to be passed in AegisFlow Shima. The inputs on the Preprocessor  chooser should not be renamed if you intend to accept image inputs wirelessly through UE nodes. It can be done, but the send node input regex for each controlnet preprocessor column must also be changed.
   Author: Aegis72 | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A

4. **Styler Pipeline** (comfyui-styler-pipeline)
   AI-assisted style suggestions and ControlNet/OpenPose-friendly conditioning for ComfyUI.
   Author:  | Installs: N/A | Version: 1.0.5

The search returned several results. Here's one node pack from the results:

**ComfyUI-YoloNasPose-Tensorrt** — a custom node pack by **yuvraj108c** that provides a YOLO-NAS-POSE implementation powered by TensorRT for ultra-fast pose estimation, adapted to work with OpenPose ControlNet (experimental).

Other notable results include **ComfyUI-Yolo-Cropper** (for automatic image cropping useful with ControlNet and IP-Adapters) and **comfyui-styler-pipeline** (AI-assisted style suggestions with ControlNet/OpenPose-friendly conditioning).

### How the pipeline was chained

1. **Stage 1** rendered "a plain wooden mask" from scratch (txt2img, full denoise).
2. After Stage 1 finished, I retrieved its actual output filename (`ComfyUI_01043_.png`) from the execution history.

4. **Stage 2** ran img2img on that staged image with prompt "an ornate golden mask" and denoise 0.55, producing `ComfyUI_01044_.png`.

3. **AegisFlow Utility Nodes** (aegisflow_utility_nodes)

3. **AegisFlow Utility Nodes** (aegisflow_utility_nodes)
   These nodes will be placed in comfyui/custom_nodes/aegisflow and contains the image passer (accepts an image as either wired or wirelessly, input and passes it through. 1. **ComfyUI YoloNasPose Tensorrt** (ComfyUI-YoloNasPose-Tensorrt)

2. **Easy automatic (square) image cropper using Yolo** (ComfyUI-Yolo-Cropper)
   A very simple and easy to use node to automaticaaly create (square) image crops and masks using YoloV8. This can be very useful when using controlnet and ip adapters
   Author: Tool Of North america | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A

3. **AegisFlow Utility Nodes** (aegisflow_utility_nodes)
   These nodes will be placed in comfyui/custom_nodes/aegisflow and contains the image passer (accepts an image as either wired or wirelessly, input and passes it through. Latent passer does the same for latents, and the Preprocessor chooser allows a passthrough image and 10 controlnets to be passed in AegisFlow Shima. The inputs on the Preprocessor  chooser should not be renamed if you intend to accept image inputs wirelessly through UE nodes. It can be done, but the send node input regex for each controlnet preprocessor column must also be changed.
   Author: Aegis72 | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A

1. **ComfyUI YoloNasPose Tensorrt** (ComfyUI-YoloNasPose-Tensorrt)

2. **Easy automatic (square) image cropper using Yolo** (ComfyUI-Yolo-Cropper)
   A very simple and easy to use node to automaticaaly create (square) image crops and masks using YoloV8. This can be very useful when using controlnet and ip adapters
   Author: Tool Of North america | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A

3. **AegisFlow Utility Nodes** (aegisflow_utility_nodes)
   These nodes will be placed in comfyui/custom_nodes/aegisflow and contains the image passer (accepts an image as either wired or wirelessly, input and passes it through. Latent passer does the same for latents, and the Preprocessor chooser allows a passthrough image and 10 controlnets to be passed in AegisFlow Shima. The inputs on the Preprocessor  chooser should not be renamed if you intend to accept image inputs wirelessly through UE nodes. It can be done, but the send node input regex for each controlnet preprocessor column must also be changed.
   Author: Aegis72 | Installs: N/A | Version: N/A
